title: Phase 2: Crawlbare Content-Fläche (Impressum, Datenschutz, Landing)
description: Add static HTML mirrors public/impressum.html, public/datenschutz.html, public/dyade-meditation.html. The landing page is the 800-1200 word answer-first content piece with FAQPage + HowTo JSON-LD. Update vercel.json to route the three paths to the static files before catch-all and remove noindex from /impressum and /datenschutz. Expand sitemap.xml. Shared static.css for the static surface.
notes: App stays untouched. Existing React legal pages remain as backup but are shadowed by the Vercel rewrites. Strict rules: no health claims, no invented studies, no esoteric language.

title: Phase 1: GEO/SEO technisches Fundament
description: Set index.html head tags (lang, title, meta description, OG, Twitter, canonical, hreflang, JSON-LD Organization+WebSite). Create public/sitemap.xml, public/llms.txt. Update vercel.json with X-Robots-Tag noindex for app routes and security headers. Move GEO-AUDIT-REPORT.md to docs/. Add docs/cloudflare-ai-crawl-policy.md as operator click-through guide.
notes: No code in app/components. Only HTML head, static public/ files, vercel.json headers, docs. App must continue to build and tests must pass.
close_reason: Phase 1 complete: head tags, JSON-LD, sitemap.xml, llms.txt, vercel.json headers, docs. tsc + build + vitest green. 3 atomic commits on main.
